name: codex-review-gate
description: Claude Code plugin — forces codex:codex-rescue review before design/spec finalization (Write-to-spec-path), plan finalization (ExitPlanMode or Write-to-plan-path), and git commit.

plugins.name: codex-review-gate
plugins.description: Hook-driven quality gate: blocks ExitPlanMode, Write-to-spec-path, Write-to-plan-path, and large git commits until the codex:codex-rescue subagent has reviewed the current artifact. Review markers are SHA fingerprints per pending artifact, matched via a [review-target:] marker in the agent prompt — any post-review change invalidates approval.
